Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjt failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget
Data.Comment: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = current odometer + distance before draining
Data.Description: This value is the odometer target when oil change is due. This value cannot be less than current odometer value. MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = current odometer + distance before draining. The main usage of this DID is for plant in order to write and read same value (ie: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = 0 + first draining interval) . In after sale, previous routine and DID are still applicable

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq
Data.Comment: This is an example data for RoutineControl request. See RoutineIdentiifierList documentation.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.EgocarType_CF
Data.Comment: Used to display the ego car according to the vehicle type

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.ESCMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for ESC message filtering(only 20403_4)

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.ExternalTemperature_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the external temperature management.
Data.Description: Note 1: When this parameter is at 01b, it means that External Temperature sensor acquisition is not managed directly by the cluster

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.FrontSBRInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows the activation or not of sound only for Front SBR warning (10104,10105)

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.GearBoxType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the GearBox type (manual or automatic) of the vehicle.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.I_BoosterSafetybag_CF
Data.Comment: Used to inhibite the safetybag function for I-booster, function present in some EV/PHEV/HEV vehicles

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.Language_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the language used for messages displayed.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MexType_CF
Data.Comment: Used to identifying the management of the current driving mode

Item.Text: With MEX Light - ECO Only C1AHS

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MSCOilChgWarningThresholdKM_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilomet
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Item.Text: present with OCS and cluster internal counter

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.OilLevelPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Allows identifying the presence of oil level management (10102_x) and DTC management

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.OverspeedWarningPresent_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of overspeed warning (10204_1).

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.ParkingBrakeType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the parking brake type (manual or assisted).

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.SCRMMI_CF
Data.Comment: Used to display SCR functions

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TACStrategy_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to select which filtering strategy of RPM pointer shall be used.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TelltaleAutotestP2_CF
Data.Comment: TelltaleAutotestP2_CF

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TemperatureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: Defines the default temperature unit that must be displayed by the Cluster ECU

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TPMSMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of TPMSMMI

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TripComputerType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the trip computer type displayed.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TyrePressureUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the tyre pressure unit displayed.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.UPAMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the presence of UPAMMI

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.VehicleGUIStyle_CF
Data.Comment: Allows to change the representation of the vehicle in the graphism shown in the TFT

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.VolumeUnit_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the volume unit of the vehicle.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.WelcomeSequenceType_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows identifying the welcome sequence variants (Bose, Initiale...)

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MSCServiceWarningThresholdKM_CF
Data.Comment: Used to define the first warning threshold for Service schedule in kilometer.
Data.Description: This configuration is used to define the first warning threshold for maintenance schedule in kilometer (ValConfigSeuilAlerte1_Km in 65450-2009-45-CDC_CLUSTER_X98).

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.DIM_DayNightModifiedByPCFN_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration used to force dimming off when PCFN/DisplayRequest =0.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.NivocodSensorType_CF
Data.Comment: whether or not brake fluid level sensor has // resistor to distinguish normaly open circ vs no senso

Item.Text: Without R// or DIAG by CAN

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.EthernetPresent_CF
Data.Comment: Used to activate / deactivate ethernet link and allow to raise DTC linked to this network

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.SecondRowFourthSafetyBelt_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to know weither the 2nd row seats are 2/3 seats or 4 seats.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget
Data.Comment: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = current odometer + distance before draining
Data.Description: This value is the odometer target when oil change is due. This value cannot be less than current odometer value. MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = current odometer + distance before draining. The main usage of this DID is for plant in order to write and read same value (ie: MSCOil_DistanceForcedTarget = 0 + first draining interval) . In after sale, previous routine and DID are still applicable

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.DynamicTacho_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to know which CAN signal the tachometer feature uses and to adapt the fil

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.WelcomeSequenceInhibition_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to activate or deactivate the welcome sequence

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.DisplayCapSide_ICE_CF
Data.Comment: allows to identify where the fuel cap is, in order to indicate the cap side on the cluster

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.DisplayCapSide_EV_CF
Data.Comment: allows to identify where the electric cap is, in order to indicate the cap side on the cluster.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.SpeedScaleType_CF
Data.Comment: used adapt cluster HMI (virtual pointer scale) to vehicle max speed (depends on engine)

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MSCServ_DistanceForcedTarget
Data.Comment: This value is the odometer target when service is due

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.EE_Architecture_Type_CF
Data.Comment: to filter some Cluster frame emission when several EE architecture are adressed with the same SW

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.ElecInstConsTypeReceived_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to choose which kind instant elec consumption will be displayed on cluster

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.RST_Cmax_DefaultOrNeutral_CF
Data.Comment: RST_Cmax_DefaultOrNeutral_CF

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.RST_Pmax_DefaultOrNeutral_CF
Data.Comment: RST_Pmax_DefaultOrNeutral_CF

Data.Name: HMI_InteractionMode_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to select how driver will interacts and select his preferences in the cluster

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.HMI_InteractionMode_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter allows to select how driver will interacts and select his preferences in the cluster

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.SBR_RightHandDriveVehicle_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter is used to adpat front SBR vignette display on right hand drive vehicle

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.RST_EngineOilPressureMax_CF
Data.Comment: RST_EngineOilPressureMax_CF

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.RST_OilTemperatureMax_CF
Data.Comment: RST_OilTemperatureMax_CF

Data.Comment: RST_BoostPressureMax_CF

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.RST_IntakeTemperatureMax_CF
Data.Comment: RST_IntakeTemperatureMax_CF

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MSCOilChgInitialDistanceInKM_CF
Data.Comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualDistanceInKM !

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.MSCOilChgInitialPeriodInDay_CF
Data.Comment: Shall be written together with MSCOilChangeUsualPeriodInDay !

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.FuelRangeCorrectKmAutonom_CF
Data.Comment: Define what t is the distance range on which the driving range is computed. Cf. Data doc field
Data.Description: Used for defining what is the distance range on which the driving range is computed. If value is 255 then the computation is done with the trip computer average consumption. Note: not used for bicarburation

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.VolumeFuelWarning_CF
Data.Comment: used to define the threshold below low fuel level warning occurs.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TCI_RemainingDistanceIncreaseInhibitionThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TCI_RemainingDistanceDisappearanceThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.TCI_RemainingDistanceWarningThreshold_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 9 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_9.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 8/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_9.

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.GAU_TempoForVU_CF
Data.Comment: Used to adapt fuel stabilization temporization to LCV/CDV (big fuel tanks)

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.EgocarColor_CF
Data.Comment: This configuration is used to defined egocar color when egocar feature is not managed by calibration

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.SCRPageMMI_CF
Data.Comment: This parameter is used to define which SCR ADAC page is available

Data.Name: MegaFrame1.RadioDisplayManagedInCluster_CF

Data.Name: L2Displayed1_CF
Data.Description: If bargraph display, bar 1 will flash is fuel level calculated is ? L2_1. If pointer display, pointer must be set at 0/8 position (lower limit in the red zone _ Reserve fuel side) if fuel level calculated = L2_1.

Data.Name: L2Displayed2_CF
Data.Description:
If bargraph display, bar 2 will light on if fuel level calculated is > L2_2.

If pointer display, pointer must be set at 1/8 position if fuel level calculated = L2_2.

Data.Name: Uoil1
Data.Comment: First voltage measure done during a "oil level" measurement procedure

Data.Name: Uoil1_timing
Data.Comment: Real timing in ms between current injection and Uoil1 measure (functional target ~10ms)

Data.Name: NumberDiagnosticResets
Data.Comment: This counter is incremented each time a reset is requested from diagnostic tools (routine 11xx)

Data.Name: NumberSafetyResets
Data.Comment: This counter is incremented each time a reset is requested by a safety mecanisme related to ASIL

Data.Name: NumberResetsWithoutBURAMLoss
Data.Comment: This counter is incremented each time a reset without BURAM loss is requested by basic software

Data.Name: MemorizedOILMeasures
Data.Comment: Used for reading oil level

Data.Name: MemorizedOILMeasuresOrigin
Data.Comment: This parameter is used for reading of ref measurement origin for OIL level

Data.Name: StartCause

Data.Name: DeltaT_OilMeasure
Data.Comment: Real timing measured between Uoil1 and Uoil2 voltage measure (functional target ~875ms)
